LanguageData.XF_Bionics.label: XF Sculptor Bionic Series
LanguageData.XF_Bionics.description: The "Sculptor Bionic" series is a cutting-edge experimental bionic technology secretly developed by Baron and his elite team. Indistinguishable from human organs in appearance, these implants possess superior performance compared to traditional bionic organs. Not only do they achieve peak functionality, but they also perfectly mimic the human body aesthetically, representing the ultimate fusion of biology and technology.
LanguageData.XFBaseTech.label: XF Base Tech
LanguageData.XFBaseTech.description: Allow player to build the XF Tech Table and make basic clothes.
LanguageData.XFWPModTech.label: XF Weapon Modification Tech
LanguageData.XFWPModTech.description: Allow player to build the XF Weapon Modification Table and modify some XF weapons.
LanguageData.XFarmorTech.label: XF Armor Tech
LanguageData.XFarmorTech.description: Allow player to make armors and helmets of Xeva Faction from XF Tech Table.
LanguageData.XFweaponTech.label: XF Weapon Tech
LanguageData.XFweaponTech.description: Allow player to make weapons of Xeva Faction from XF Tech Table.
LanguageData.SecretXResearch.label: XF Anomaly Research
LanguageData.StrangeAncientXResearch.label: XF Strange Ancient Research
LanguageData.StrangeAncientXResearch.description: Background investigation and the application of nanomechanics.
